description_long: This is a plush toy designed to resemble a cartoon mouse with a large, round head and oversized ears. The mouse is primarily gray with a lighter gray belly and inner ears, and it features two pink flower accessories attached to its head, one on each side. The face is simple and cute, with large black eyes and a small black nose, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The toy has small, rounded arms and legs, and a tiny tail is visible at the back. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of stuffed toys, and the overall shape is rounded and huggable. This toy would likely appeal to children and could be found in parks, playgrounds, or urban family spaces.
description: A soft, gray cartoon mouse plush toy with oversized ears and pink flower accessories, featuring a cute, simple face and rounded body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mouse's face, large ears, and both pink flower accessories clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the ears and the profile of the head, with one flower accessory visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both large ears, and the small tail at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the other ear and flower accessory, with the face partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with large, round black eyes and a small, simple nose. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms resting at the sides and legs slightly apart, head facing forward.
